purpose: Prompt protocol for live Codex-style and Claude-style execution of the AIDE paper-derived skill.
evidence_boundary: Prompt packet only; live agent responses must be collected separately after the remote LLM provider recovers.
user_prompt: Given the PaperToSkill idea, produce a small local AIDE-style code optimization run plan. The plan must preserve a solution tree, stateless objective function, draft/debug/improve actions, context summarization, data preview, validation metrics, best-solution selection, limitations, and harness-transfer adaptations.
output_contract: A concise run objective for an AIDE-style PaperToSkill code optimization experiment.
A solution-tree schema covering node code, parent edge, score, buggy status, and selected base node.
A draft/debug/improve loop with debug-depth budget and one atomic measurable change per improve step.
A context summary schema covering performance metrics, hyperparameters, and debugging hints.
A data-preview schema covering dataset size, column names, data splits, and target metric.
A validation plan with objective function, local execution commands, final best-solution selection, and failure recording.
Limitations copied or adapted from the source-backed skill.
A transfer-adaptation note explaining what changed for the target harness.
evaluation_notes: Do not claim live experimental success unless an actual run was executed.
Preserve source-backed claims separately from harness-specific adaptations.
Record missing code execution, missing datasets, unavailable scoring, or excessive cost as limitations.

context_variants.label: PaperToSkill generated skill with transfer notes
Generated skill with Transfer Notes removed

target_harnesses.label: Codex-style coding-agent harness
target_harnesses.instructions: Act as a coding research agent using the provided context as a skill. Produce an executable local plan with file artifacts, commands, validation checks, logs, retry conditions, and stop conditions. Be explicit about what is source-backed versus adapted for the local Codex workspace.

target_harnesses.label: Claude-style project prompt harness
target_harnesses.instructions: Act as a project-level research assistant using the provided context as reusable project instructions. Produce a harness-neutral code-optimization plan that a Claude-style agent could follow, including assumptions, unavailable tools, validation checks, and transfer-specific adaptations.
